sql: SELECT SUM(daily_register_count) AS 上周注册用户 FROM dws.dws_user_daily_quiz_stats_day WHERE stat_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB('2026-03-28', INTERVAL WEEKDAY('2026-03-28')+7 DAY) AND DATE_SUB('2026-03-28', INTERVAL WEEKDAY('2026-03-28')+1 DAY)

SELECT stat_date, daily_register_count AS 注册用户 FROM dws.dws_user_daily_quiz_stats_day WHERE stat_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB('2026-03-30', INTERVAL WEEKDAY('2026-03-30') DAY) AND DATE_SUB('2026-03-30', INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY stat_date
SELECT start_dt, end_dt, pay_conv_rate AS 付费转化率 FROM dws.dws_pay_user_report_week ORDER BY end_dt DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT stat_date, daily_register_count AS 注册用户 FROM dws.dws_user_daily_quiz_stats_day WHERE stat_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB('2026-03-28', INTERVAL WEEKDAY('2026-03-28') DAY) AND DATE_SUB('2026-03-28', INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY stat_date
